name: afi-math
description: Canonical executable off-chain math kernel package for AFI Protocol (emissions schedule, time value, curves, valuation, signal decay). Sole source of truth for promoted deterministic protocol formulas, per afi-governance decision math-authority-v0.1.

consumerNotes.afi-core: Direct SDK/wrapper consumer; pins afi-math by commit and should delegate pure math here rather than redefining kernels.
consumerNotes.afi-reactor: Consumes math transitively through afi-core surfaces; reference runtime, not a math authority; no direct afi-math import today.
consumerNotes.afi-mint: Intended consumer: should consume the canonical emissions schedule from afi-math instead of duplicating it (de-inlining tracked as follow-up PR-3 in afi-governance decisions/math-authority-v0.1.md).
consumerNotes.afi-token: Does not import afi-math; mirrors constants (e.g. supply cap) on-chain and requires governance/test-vector traceability to afi-math golden vectors.
consumerNotes.afi-econ: Not a consumer: research/simulation/reference modeling; formulas become executable canon only via governed promotion into afi-math.
